hooks.command:
echo 'ProductionOS 5.1 — 35 agents | 13 commands | tri-tiered evaluation

Orchestrative:
  /omni-plan-nth           Recursive until 10/10 (chains all skills)
  /auto-swarm-nth "task"   Recursive swarm (100% coverage)

Pipeline:
  /omni-plan               13-step orchestrative pipeline
  /auto-swarm "task"       Distributed agent swarm
  /production-upgrade      Recursive product audit

Specialized:
  /deep-research           8-phase research pipeline
  /agentic-eval            CLEAR v2.0 evaluation
  /security-audit          7-domain security audit
  /context-engineer        Token-optimized context
  /logic-mode              Business idea validation
  /learn-mode              Interactive code tutor
  /productionos-update     Self-update from GitHub
  /productionos-help       Usage guide and workflows'
